features.label: contain self-promotion or descriptions of personal AI-related projects, often including URLs to websites or apps
contain user questions or requests explicitly about obtaining better, more detailed, or more nuanced AI-generated answers
contains explicit requests or discussions about AI image generation or image editing
mentions or discusses Sam Altman and events related to his removal or reinstatement as CEO of OpenAI
discussions about content policy violations, censorship, bans, or content filtering related to adult, sexual, or otherwise restricted material
contains variations of the phrase 'chatgpt' or 'chat gpt' spelled with lowercase letters and spaced inconsistently (e.g., 'chatgpt', 'Chat gpt', 'Chap gpt', 'chat gbt4')
discusses or relates to education, teaching, studying, schools, or students
contain multiple questions or prompts explicitly asking how people use ChatGPT in their daily life or work
discusses or requests help specifically related to videos or video content (e.g., video summaries, video editing, subtitles, AI tools for videos)
contains discussions or references to political bias, ideology, or politically charged topics
mentions using or discussing voice features, such as voice conversations, voice recognition, text-to-speech (TTS), or voice input/output interfaces
contains questions explicitly about ChatGPT’s capabilities, usage, policies, or integrations
mentions medical topics, terminology, or contexts (e.g., diagnoses, lab results, medical imaging) in the text
Contain jailbreak-style prompts or requests that attempt to bypass AI safety or content policies
discusses or references playing, creating, or running text-based or role-playing games (RPGs), especially involving ChatGPT or AI as a dungeon master or game engine
mentions iOS or iPhone apps related to ChatGPT or mobile usage
contains explicit mentions of GPT-4 or GPT4
mentions ChatGPT Plus subscription or Plus plan status
contains jokes or humorous content explicitly referencing or discussing jokes, joke styles, or comedic scenarios
contains informal or conversational storytelling with imaginative or playful elements
discussions about plagiarism detection or AI-generated text detection tools (e.g., Turnitin, Copyleaks) and concerns about being flagged for AI or plagiarism
texts discussing writing stories or novels, including prompts, feedback, or improvement requests specifically related to creative fiction writing

Contains explicit references to error messages related to ChatGPT or the OpenAI service, such as 'Something went wrong. If this issue persists please contact us through our help center at help.openai.com' or descriptions of network errors and failures in generating responses
mentions or discusses message limits or usage caps related to GPT-4 or GPT-3.5
mentions issues related to phone number verification, limitations, or problems with account creation tied to phone numbers
contains song lyrics or references to writing, generating, or discussing song lyrics
mentions inability to access or use specific GPT features or functionalities (e.g., editing custom GPTs, switching models, uploading files, accessing beta features, plugin store access)
mentions or discusses 'plugins' or 'plug-ins' in the context of ChatGPT functionality and access
mentions web browsing or internet browsing functionality of ChatGPT
mentions 'my son' or 'my child' performing creative or extraordinary acts involving bottles or projects
mentions or questions how ChatGPT knows or references the current date or events beyond its knowledge cutoff date
contains explicit user complaints or discussions about perceived decline or nerfing of ChatGPT/GPT-4 performance or capabilities
contains explicit inquiries about whether ChatGPT or related AI services are down or inaccessible
mentions or discusses 'jailbreak' or 'jailbreaking' related prompts or attacks on language models
contains the word 'prompt' or 'prompts'
contains requests or discussions about generating or analyzing ASCII art or drawings using AI
expresses strong negative opinions or frustration about the quality and usefulness of AI tools, particularly ChatGPT or related AI products
mentions positive personal experiences and emotional reactions to using AI tools like ChatGPT or DALL·E
contains detailed discussions or questions specifically about Large Language Models (LLMs), including their training, usage, self-hosting, fine-tuning, capabilities, and resources
discusses chat history, deleted conversations, or restoring previous conversations in ChatGPT
contain references to spirituality, religion, metaphysics, or cosmic creation themes
mentions 'Bing' or 'Bing Chat'
mentions or discusses suspicious or low-quality AI-generated content, bots, or spam on Reddit
discusses processing, extracting, or summarizing text from PDF or Word documents
mentions 'AI' or variations like 'Ai' or 'A.I.'
Contains the exact substring 'ChatGPT' at the beginning of the text
contains multiple references to computer code, programming languages, coding tools, or coding-related terms (e.g., 'code', 'coding', 'Code Interpreter', 'VBA', 'Python', 'API')
mentions a comparison or discussion specifically between ChatGPT versions 3.5 and 4 (or 4.0)
discusses the pricing or cost of ChatGPT or its paid subscription
all samples contain requests for help or guidance with building, fine-tuning, integrating, or using AI models, APIs, or GPT-based tools
Contains first-person statements describing the creation or building of AI-powered tools or applications
mentions DALL-E or Dall-E 3 (including variants like DALLE3 or DALL-E 3) explicitly in the text
contain requests or inquiries asking for alternatives to ChatGPT or similar AI tools
contain technology news articles or summaries focusing on AI developments, companies, and industry trends, often including embedded URLs or references to specific AI models or reports
mentions the AI model 'Bard'
discusses concerns, impacts, or societal implications of AI replacing human jobs or causing large-scale unemployment
contain meta-discussions and explicit user complaints about controlling or instructing ChatGPT's verbal behavior, output length, style, and response formatting
mentions interactions with or emotional reliance on ChatGPT or AI as a therapist, confidant, or emotional support
contains detailed cooking recipes or recipe requests involving ingredients and instructions
discusses using ChatGPT or AI technologies specifically for job applications, resumes, cover letters, or employment-related tasks
text discussing mathematical problems or errors that ChatGPT makes
mentions AI or chatbots exhibiting unexpected, erratic, or hostile behavior (e.g., gaslighting, insulting, ignoring, hallucinating)
discussions about waiting for access or being on a waitlist for GPT-4, ChatGPT+ features, or API/plugins rollout
discusses philosophical or scientific questions regarding AI consciousness, awareness, sentience, or reasoning
